spells.name: Darkness
spells.description: Create magical darkness in a 15-foot-radius sphere or emanation that darkvision cannot penetrate and low-level magical light can be dispelled by.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: A willing creature you touch gains darkvision with a range of 150 feet.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.description: Hurl three fiery rays at one or more targets, making a ranged spell attack for each ray and dealing 2d6 fire damage on each hit.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: A loud burst erupts in a 10-foot-radius sphere; creatures make Constitution saves and nonmagical objects in the area also take thunder damage.

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.description: Project a 60-foot line of strong wind that pushes creatures, hampers movement toward you, disperses gas or vapor, and can extinguish flames.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.description: See invisible creatures and objects as visible and perceive into the Ethereal Plane.
